review_notes: Column 1 holds the full name as 'SURNAME Firstname' in mixed Latin/Cyrillic script; split on the first space.
Column 5 (Паспорт) is a passport number, so the document type is passport when a number is present.
No columns for sex, citizenship, or birthplace — these must be inferred or captured at check-in.
Column 7 marks TOUR-LEADER and DRIVER (service staff): the tour leader has no passport and the drivers have no birth date — expect these to stay flagged.
